subject_lines: Quick booking flow observation for Bright Smile Dental
Spotted something on your contact page
primary_email:
Hi Sarah,

I was looking at Bright Smile Dental's website and noticed your contact page directs patients to call during office hours to book appointments.

For a practice your size — 3 dentists across two locations — that likely means your front desk handles a high volume of scheduling calls, and after-hours requests may slip through.

I put together a short booking flow review for your practice. It flags a couple of things that might be costing you appointments and shows what a simple fix could look like.

Would it be useful if I sent it over?

Best,
Luc
shorter_email_variant:
Hi Sarah,

Noticed Bright Smile Dental's booking is phone-only — for a growing multi-location practice, that can quietly cost appointments.

I put together a quick booking flow review. Want me to send it?

Best,
Luc
linkedin_message: Hi Sarah — I came across Bright Smile Dental while researching dental practices in the area. Noticed your patient booking is phone-only, which can create friction for after-hours requests. I put together a short booking flow review — happy to share if useful.
follow_up_variants: Hi Sarah, just bumping this in case it got buried. Happy to send over the booking flow review whenever works.

Hi Sarah — I also noticed your practice added a third dentist recently. Growing teams often hit a tipping point where phone-only booking becomes a bottleneck. The review I mentioned covers exactly that. Worth a quick look?

Hi Sarah, I know inboxes get busy. If the timing isn't right, no worries at all — just didn't want the booking review to go to waste since it's specific to your practice. Either way, wishing Bright Smile continued growth.
cta: Would it be useful if I sent it over?
rationale_for_angle: Leading with the booking flow observation because it is directly observed (phone-only contact page) and connects to a concrete, low-effort improvement. The lead magnet (booking flow audit) provides immediate value without requiring commitment.
